title: vicrays Rice Dessert Cereal Bowls 6 Piece Stoneware Vintage Look Ceramic Starry Blue Large Serving Bowl, Soup/Mixing/Fruit/Noodle/Ramen China Bowl, Capacity of 940 ml. (18x18x6.3 cm)
features: 🍲Large Enough for Families - Great size 18 cm diameter, depth 6.3 cm height,big enough to use for cooking hot cereals or oatmeal in the microwave WITHOUT overflowing. Perfect for soup, pasta, nuts, salad, fruit, rice and noodle without spillage.

🍲Stylish Fluted Design with Reactive Glaze - Why FLUTED? It is easy to hold HOT and COLD items in your hand. The reactive glaze creates unique effect of color for each product, making each one the only one in the world.

🍲PRO-Grade Porcelain - Our clay is manufactured using only the highest quality porcelain, LEAD-FREE, and NON-TOXIC, chip-resistant. Microwave, oven, dishwasher, and freezer safe. Sturdy and durable enough for years of use.

🍲Stackable & Easy to Clean - These bowls set are stackable and DON'T take up a lot of space in your cupboard. They are easy to clean, you can wash them with soap and hot water or place them into your dishwasher. The gloss still looks like new after long time use.
🍲VICRAYS's Promise - We provide a free refund or replacement for any defective products, anytime. Just let us know what happened. We offer daily customer service because you are important to us.
description: Product Description BRING SOME COLOR TO YOUR DAILY LIFE Vicrays Porcelain Pasta Bowls Set This Vicrays ceramic pasta Bowls Set is made from high quality ceramic and glaze. Lead-free and Non-toxic hybrid ceramic nonstick resists flaking or chipping, long lasting and offer unique baked good experience and very easy cleanup. This Porcelain Cereal Bowls Set is suitable for rice, pasta, ramen noodle, oatmeal and etc. Attention: Important Notes: No direct fire and induction cooker. Made in：China Made of: Stoneware Dimensions: 7” Dia × 2.5'' H Weight: 519 ± 5g Quantity：6 pcs Capacity: 32 OZ Color Option：White, Black, Starry Blue, Emerald Green UNIQUE COLOR The reactive glaze creates unique effect of color for each product, making each one the only one in the world. HEALTHY & DURABLE Our porcelains are fired at a high temperature around 2400°F, ensuring them STURDY, DURABLE, LEAD-FREE and NON-TOXIC. DECORATE YOUR LIFE Stylish and simple design that matches your food will enhance your dining experience, can also be used as an elegant decoration. CLOSE TO NATURE We use natural materials and ingredients to create our products, sculpting by hand, inspired by the nature. VICRAYS makes your home look more beautiful, adds personality to your interior, and creates close-to-nature moments at the dining table.
